title: Classic Aspect
description: Makes your Minecraft feels old again! with old and all-new assets :D!!!!
body:
## I don't like the new Minecraft textures, so, i fixed it ;b

# Classic Aspect makes your entire world looks like the old Minecraft, in new versions >w< (1.12+)

### It includes some content like:  

### Old-style spears, Pigmens, Old and new Villagers textures, Some minecraft's deleted textures, Old sounds, Some especific blocks textures (Like sniffer egg, chiseled resin bricks, beehive, and others), Custom paintings, New baby mobs, Sulfur stuff and others :3!

![Colorful Bounce Update!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/014885899a0a810f6990e9956a6d9011a17e2452_0.webp)

**(This is only the java version)**

_You can go to the discord server, and help us giving feedback, reporting bugs, See the texture news, or just talk with people :V

Find me in YT as: [Hec_XD], there i upload the texture updates, some leaks and others lol._
